quests.title: Recover Your Core Profile
quests.description: Find the Profile Shard hidden near the water edge and restore the first journal entry.
steps: Open the journal and review the restored summary

quests.title: Prove Field Credibility
quests.description: Meet the Field Mentor to restore the practical field-work section.
steps: Reach the east side of town

quests.title: Stabilize the Workshop Route
quests.description: Recover the Builder Shard and bring it to the Workshop Terminal to reassemble the builder/product layer of the resume.

quests.title: Assemble the Operating System
quests.description: Speak to the Archive Keeper and restore the operations/leadership layer of the resume.
